description_long: This yacht features a sleek, elongated hull with a flat bottom and a raised deck area, giving it a modern and streamlined appearance. The deck is bordered by light-colored railings, providing safety and a clear boundary around the perimeter. A central staircase descends from the deck to the ground, indicating an accessible entry point and a split-level design. The hull is predominantly white with a smooth finish, while the deck and railings are rendered in a light wood tone, creating a visually appealing contrast. The yacht lacks visible windows or cabin enclosures, suggesting an open-deck configuration. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, open-deck yacht with a white hull, light wood railings, and a central staircase, featuring a sleek and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central staircase, and the symmetry of the railings along the deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the hull, the raised deck, and the full staircase descending from the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stern, the open deck area, and the continuation of the railings around the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the staircase, the flat bottom of the hull, and the extended deck layout.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a monohull with a flat bottom and a pointed bow, finished in white with no visible markings or keels. The sides are smooth and uninterrupted, emphasizing a streamlined, modern profile.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is a single raised level with a central open area, bordered by light wood railings on all sides. A staircase provides access from the ground to the deck, and the layout is open with no visible seating or equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No enclosed cabin structure is visible; the yacht features an open deck with no windows, doors, or superstructure, indicating a fully open-air design.
